_notes: W4A-2 (D3/LC3): static sector/theme map for sector:<name> fuse buckets.
Scope = config/universe.json (38 equities/ETFs + futures roots) + the
crypto lane pairs + the two extra micro-FX roots the harness recognises
An unmapped symbol lands in the sector:unmapped bucket — count-only,
NEVER trippable (PLAN_W4A §4): a missing map row must not create a
blockable bucket nobody ratified. Coverage of the universe is pinned
hard by chad/tests/test_w4a_fuse_config_parity.py, so a symbol added to
universe.json without a row here fails CI instead of silently draining
NOTE: futures symbols are mapped for completeness but futures rows are
currently excluded from fuse counting entirely (futures_bug_b predicate)
until the Bug-B book disposition — these rows become live when that
